parameters.perturbation_scope: multi-head K-only (2-8 heads at ALL positions and ALL layers)

prediction_outcome: Scenario A CONFIRMED but stronger than predicted. H0+H5=3.7% (predicted 25-50%). Gap +95.1pp (predicted ≥25pp). Scenarios B,C,D all DISCONFIRMED.
key_finding: DECISIVE answer-head specialization: H0+H5 (25% cap) → 3.7% acc vs dispensable pairs (25%) → 96-100%. Gap +95.1pp. Per-problem concordance 25/27. At 50%: disp4=22.2% vs ans+disp=0%. Answer heads necessary but NOT sufficient (leave-only=0%).
evidence_impact: Strongest functional dissociation in the program. Answer heads DECISIVELY confirmed as specialized answer-routing circuit. Head identity matters more than capacity fraction. Two-regime redundancy curve established.
next_planned: Multi-head threshold on Llama OR H5 x position interaction OR H5 attention pattern analysis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive (H0+H5 +95pp gap).

positional_dissociation.status: Dose-saturated: 5% dose STILL saturates Llama accuracy. Text gradient dose-independent. Encoding-dependent at 5%.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute.

head_level_analysis.status: DECISIVE: Answer-head specialization confirmed by multi-head dose-matched test (+95pp, 25/27 concordance). H0+H5 necessary but not sufficient.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for major findings: 4 families, 5 variants. Per-head on 2 models. Multi-head on 1 model (Qwen).

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + head-level redundancy encoding-dependent confirmed.
